riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)

causalAutopsy.notes: keystoneBalance (#893) shipped with only a starvation dimension (oversight-since-keystone count) and no wall-clock staleness dimension, so a keystone layer that simply goes silent (zero cycles of any kind) read 'healthy' because oversightSinceKeystone stays 0. Surfaced live during RUN-2 dogfooding: the registered codey-to-gemini instance reported starved:false / keystone-healthy while its last real mentee drive was ~24h stale. The dormant flag added here is the missing dimension. Latent in #893 from the moment it shipped.
